suite_A.description: Single chip inference, Llama-3-8B-Instruct. Minimum required suite for leaderboard entry.

suite_B.description: Large model inference, Llama-3-70B-Instruct. Chip count is flexible — use however many chips your hardware needs. Leaderboard groups results by chip count.

suite_C.description: Quantization efficiency benchmark. Measures throughput and accuracy across BF16, FP16, FP8, W8A8, W8A16, and W4A16 precision formats using fixed pre-quantized checkpoints. FP16 is included as a hardware-compatibility baseline for pre-Ampere GPUs.

suite_D.description: Single chip long-context inference, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (~28K context). OOM at higher concurrency levels is expected and recorded.

suite_E.description: Multi-chip scaling efficiency. Fixed model (Llama-3-8B), varying chip count (1x/2x/4x). Measures interconnect efficiency independent of chip speed.

suite_F.description: Consumer/edge single-GPU inference. Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Designed for GPUs with ≥4 GB VRAM. No chip count requirement — single-chip is the intended use case.
